Description: Hardcoded absolute path to local git workspace in config/code/scripts
Author: casonk
Message:
Add contributor architecture docs and PlantUML diagram

- docs/contributor-architecture-blueprint.md: 4-layer architecture map
  (Installation, Configuration, Session Management, Alias), component
  map, data flow, session naming convention, shared patterns
- docs/diagrams/repo-architecture.puml: PlantUML diagram showing layer
  stack, source files, runtime artifacts, external inputs and data flow
- README.md: link to architecture docs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Description: Hardcoded absolute path to local git workspace in config/code/scripts
Author: casonk
Message:
Add draw.io integration, setup.sh, and render all diagrams

- setup.sh: downloads PlantUML jar + draw.io AppImage (extracted for
  FUSE-free use), renders all docs/diagrams sources to SVG + PNG
  mirrors personal-finance tool-bootstrap pattern; supports
  --skip-drawio and PLANTUML_VERSION/DRAWIO_VERSION env overrides
- docs/diagrams/repo-architecture.drawio: draw.io architecture source
- docs/diagrams/repo-architecture.drawio.svg/.png: draw.io renders
- docs/diagrams/repo-architecture.svg/.png: PlantUML renders
- .gitignore: exclude tools/ bootstrap dir
- README.md: document setup.sh and diagram re-render workflow

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
